root_text.an5.252:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā nissayo dātabbo.
root_text.an5.252:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu asekhena sīlakkhandhena samannāgato hoti …pe… asekhena vimuttiñāṇadassanakkhandhena samannāgato hoti.

translation_text.an5.252:1.1: “Mendicants, dependence should be given by a mendicant with five qualities.
translation_text.an5.252:1.3: It’s a mendicant who has the entire spectrum of an adept’s ethics, immersion, wisdom, freedom, and the knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an5.252:1.4: Dependence should be given by a mendicant with these five qualities.”
